proposed_candidates.rationale: INITIAL title prefix meaning 'announcer/proclaimer'; parallels M073 kōṉ (king) in initial position. The -ṟ vs -ṉ distinction = active vs static title.

proposed_candidates.dedr: DEDR 0788 (eṉ = said/spoken; first person marker in Tamil)
proposed_candidates.rationale: First-person determinative used as title prefix: 'said by [name]' — common seal function. Parallels Sumerian 'ki-bi-gi4-a' (reply/proclamation) marker.
Reflexive possessive as seal authenticator: 'own/personal seal of [name]'. Would explain why P324 appears before personal name components.
Clan/family classifier = ANIMAL-CLAN equivalent for CISI inscriptions. P324 preceding personal name = 'of the clan of [name]'. Supports INITIAL position and grammatical parallelism with Holdat.

best_candidate.rationale: Clan/family classifier = ANIMAL-CLAN equivalent for CISI inscriptions. P324 preceding personal name = 'of the clan of [name]'. Supports INITIAL position and grammatical parallelism with Holdat.

p324_reading_proposal.holdat_analog: M267 (iN/in, MEDIUM) — both are INITIAL title/genitive prefixes
evidence_chain: P324 INITIAL 78% (Phase-221): same rate as M267 (82%) in Holdat
P324 freq=99 in CISI: high enough to be functional grammar marker
P324 not in M77 Holdat: CISI-exclusive → possibly a title used only at CISI sites

cisi_p324_summary.holdat_analog: M267 (iN/in, MEDIUM) — both are INITIAL title/genitive prefixes

verdict: Phase-234: P324 analysis — INITIAL 86%, best reading proposal: 'kuṭi' (LOW_CANDIDATE), Holdat analog: M267 (iN/in, MEDIUM) — both are INITIAL title/genitive prefixes. LOW→MEDIUM upgrades: 0 MEDIUM proposals + 0 LOW_STRONG proposals from 243 LOW anchors. CISI cross-corpus corroboration enabled 0/243 (0%) upgrade candidates.
